contributors.bus_factor_note: Minimum number of contributors accounting for >50% of total contributions. A lower number indicates higher key-person risk.
contributors.limitations: Contributor counts use public GitHub issue, PR and contributor endpoints only.

limitations: Search queries are intentionally not collected.
Counts use GoatCounter's privacy-aware visitor model.

head_commit.message:
Adding interpol.jl, hyperbolic1D.jl and edit on Operators.jl (#340)

* Adding interpol.jl, hyperbolic1D.jl and edit on Operators.jl

* Completed hyperbolic1D and work in progress on burgers1D

* modified changes on interpol.jl

* removed comments print tstatements from burgers1D.jl

* Added tests for interpol operator

* adding interpol test

* Created function method for burgers, and added png and animation

* png and gif of Burgers1D

* Moved files to a new folder

* Updated hyperbolic1D.jl file

* outputs of hyperbolic1D.jl

* Hyperbolic Problems index.md

* Documentation of 1D Hyperbolic problems Hyperbolic1D.md, Burgers1D.md, and its index.md

* Modified index.md in examples file to include hyperbolic problems

* Added Hyperbolic Problems to src/index.md to include Burgers1D and Hyperbolic1D

* Modified index.md to include interpol operator

* Removed output foler

* Changed how documenation of interpol.jl is written to work on docs file

* removed comment of tests that were used to test how I would create for loop for testset

case_studies.authors: Ferrer, De La Puente, Farres, Castillo
case_studies.outcome: Used MOLE mimetic operators for seismic modeling in complex geological media
case_studies.title: 3D Viscoelastic Anisotropic Seismic Modeling

case_studies.outcome: Students learned mimetic methods using MOLE for PDE coursework
case_studies.title: MOLE in SDSU Graduate Course

case_studies.outcome: Peer-reviewed publication establishing MOLE as a citable scientific software
case_studies.title: MOLE JOSS Publication

accomplishments: Released MOLE v1.2.0 with Julia bindings, C++ mimetic operators, and scalar boundary conditions
Established 4 governance circles and steering council per OSE governance model
Integrated MOLE into SDSU graduate coursework (Computational Science 650)
Created MATLAB File Exchange entry for broader MATLAB community access

requested_work.impact: Quantitative performance tracking for CASS metrics

risks.mitigation: Onboarding new contributors through governance circles and good-first-issue labels
risks.risk: Key contributor dependency on 2 developers (bus factor)
No Spack or conda-forge packaging for HPC adoption
Limited Python bindings restrict broader community adoption

metric_definitions.adoption_found_count: Number of package registries where the project is registered.
metric_definitions.bus_factor: Minimum number of contributors whose departure would leave >50% of contributions uncovered.
metric_definitions.change_request_closure_ratio: PRs merged divided by (merged + closed-unmerged + open-beyond-threshold).
metric_definitions.community_standards_compliance_score: Fraction of expected community standard files present in the repository.
metric_definitions.documentation_not_found_count: Documentation 404 events grouped by normalized path.
metric_definitions.documentation_search_count: Documentation search events without raw query text.
metric_definitions.documentation_visitors: Aggregate documentation visitors from the configured documentation analytics provider.
metric_definitions.github_actions_success_rate: Completed successful workflow runs divided by completed runs.
metric_definitions.governance_score: Composite score (0-1) assessing community standards, security, and contributor diversity.
metric_definitions.median_bug_close_days: Median days from bug-labeled issue creation to close.
metric_definitions.median_first_response_days: Median days until the first issue or PR comment by someone other than the author.
metric_definitions.median_first_review_days: Median days until the first pull-request review by someone other than the author.
metric_definitions.median_issue_close_days: Median days from issue creation to close.
metric_definitions.median_pr_merge_days: Median days from pull request creation to merge.
metric_definitions.newcomer_funnel: First-time PR authors in the default period and how many had their PR merged.
metric_definitions.open_over_threshold_items: Open issues and pull requests older than reporting.stale_days.
metric_definitions.openssf_score: OpenSSF Scorecard aggregate security score (0-10, higher is better).
metric_definitions.readthedocs_no_result_searches: Documentation search queries that returned zero results.
metric_definitions.release_asset_downloads: GitHub release asset downloads, excluding generated source archives.
metric_definitions.release_cadence_stddev_days: Standard deviation of release intervals in days. Lower means more consistent cadence.
metric_definitions.targets_progress: Progress toward annual target metrics defined in project-data.yml, expressed as a 0-1 ratio.
metric_definitions.untriaged_items: Open issues or pull requests with no labels.

definitions.github_stale_label: The GitHub stale label is preserved separately in label filters and label metrics.
definitions.open_over_threshold_items: Open issues and pull requests older than the configured 90-day threshold.

engagement.limitations: First-response and review metrics require collected issue comments and PR reviews. When review data is absent, review timing is reported as unavailable.
